details.scenario: Verify Android Splash Screen & Login Screen Rendering
details.steps:
1. Launch app package com.aiinterview
2. Wait for Splash logo animation
3. Verify Email/Password fields rendered
details.expected: App logo, welcome title, email input, password input, and Sign In button are visible.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Empty Fields Submission Error Messaging
details.steps:
1. Tap Sign In button without entering credentials
2. Check for validation error banner
details.expected: Validation error "Email and password are required" is displayed.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Invalid Email Format Error on Android keyboard input
details.steps:
1. Enter "invalid-email-string"
2. Tap Password field
3. Tap Sign In
details.expected: Validation error "Please enter a valid email address" appears.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Password Masking and Eye Toggle Button
details.steps:
1. Enter password "Secret123!"
2. Verify text is masked (dots)
3. Tap Eye icon
4. Verify text is visible
details.expected: Password text toggles between obscured bullet points and plain text.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Successful Android User Login with Valid Credentials
details.steps:
1. Enter "testuser@mockai.com"
2. Enter "Password@123"
3. Tap Sign In
4. Wait for dashboard route
details.expected: User is authenticated, token saved to EncryptedSharedPreferences, home dashboard loads.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Navigation to User Registration Screen
details.steps:
1. Tap "Don't have an account? Sign Up" link
2. Verify Register Screen renders
details.expected: Registration screen loads with Full Name, Email, Password, Role selector, and Sign Up button.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify New Candidate Account Registration
details.steps:
1. Fill Name "John Doe", Email "johndoe@test.com", Password "Pass123!"
2. Select Candidate role
3. Tap Sign Up
details.expected: Account created successfully, welcome message displayed, navigated to onboard questionnaire.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Forgot Password Link & Reset Password Email Request
details.steps:
1. Tap "Forgot Password?"
2. Enter "johndoe@test.com"
3. Tap Send Reset Code
details.expected: Confirmation toast displays "Reset link sent to your registered email address".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify User Welcome Header and Avatar Icon Display
details.steps:
1. Navigate to Home Dashboard
2. Verify top navbar contains user greeting and profile avatar
details.expected: Greeting "Welcome back, John!" and avatar displaying initials "JD" are visible.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Overview Statistics Cards (Total Interviews, Avg Score, Practice Hours)
details.steps:
1. Inspect Home screen stats section
2. Verify 3 summary card elements
details.expected: Stats cards render non-zero metric values with appropriate icons and titles.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify "Start New Interview" Quick Action Button
details.steps:
1. Tap "Start New Interview" button on Home screen
2. Verify navigation to setup screen
details.expected: App transitions smoothly to Interview Setup screen.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify "Take Practice Quiz" Quick Action Button
details.steps:
1. Tap "Practice Quiz" card
2. Verify Quiz module screen loads
details.expected: App transitions to Practice Quiz category selection screen.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Bottom Navigation Bar Switch Between Tabs
details.steps: 1. Tap Home tab -> 2. Tap Jobs tab -> 3. Tap Sessions tab -> 4. Tap Profile tab
details.expected: Bottom navigation bar updates active icon state and swaps screen views effortlessly.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Swipe-to-Refresh Gesture on Home Feed
details.steps:
1. Swipe down on Home screen RecyclerView/LazyColumn
2. Verify SwipeRefresh indicator
details.expected: Refresh spinner displays, telemetry API refetched, updated feed renders.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Job Role & Target Seniority Level Selection
details.steps:
1. Open Interview Setup screen
2. Select Role "Senior Software Engineer"
3. Select Seniority "Senior (5+ yrs)"
details.expected: Selected parameters are highlighted and saved to session context.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Camera & Microphone Android Permission Granting Prompt
details.steps:
1. Tap "Start AI Interview Session"
2. Verify Android OS permission dialogs for CAMERA and RECORD_AUDIO
details.expected: App requests camera/microphone access, auto-granted or allowed by user.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Live AI Interview Camera Preview & Question Card Display
details.steps:
1. Enter active interview room
2. Check camera preview feed container
3. Check Question 1 text display
details.expected: Front camera feed streams in corner frame, Question 1 text is displayed clearly.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Microphone Mute/Unmute Toggle & Audio Telemetry Bar
details.steps:
1. Tap Microphone toggle button
2. Speak into mic
3. Verify audio waveform animation
details.expected: Mic toggles state, audio amplitude waveform responds to audio input.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Answer Submission & Next Question Loading
details.steps:
1. Complete voice answer for Question 1
2. Tap "Submit Answer & Next"
3. Check Question 2 load
details.expected: Answer recorded, progress bar advances to Q2 (20%), next question appears.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify End Interview Session & AI Analysis Report Generation
details.steps:
1. Complete final question
2. Tap "Finish Interview"
3. Wait for AI analysis screen
details.expected: Interview finishes, backend processes audio/text telemetry, detailed AI Feedback screen displays.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Tech Stack Categories (Data Structures, System Design, Android, Web)
details.steps:
1. Navigate to Quiz section
2. Verify category grid cards display with topic icons and question counts
details.expected: Category grid displays 4+ domains with active question counters.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Multiple Choice Option Radio Button Selection
details.steps:
1. Select "Data Structures"
2. Tap Option B
3. Verify radio button selection highlight state
details.expected: Option B highlights green/blue, answer state updated in temporary quiz store.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Quiz Countdown Timer Functionality
details.steps:
1. Start timed quiz (10 mins)
2. Observe top right clock timer count down
details.expected: Timer decrements every second continuously without UI freezing.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Instant Score Calculation & Correct Answer Explanations
details.steps:
1. Answer 5 questions
2. Tap Submit Quiz
3. Review Score Breakdown screen
details.expected: Final score (e.g. 80%) shown with breakdown of correct/incorrect options and detailed explanations.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Android Storage Access Document Picker Invocation
details.steps:
1. Navigate to Resume Upload module
2. Tap "Choose PDF/DOCX Document"
3. Verify Intent action ACTION_GET_CONTENT
details.expected: Android system file picker dialog opens to select resume files.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Error Toast for Unsupported File Extension (.txt / .exe)
details.steps:
1. Select unsupported file format
2. Attempt upload
details.expected: Error message "Invalid file type. Please upload a PDF or DOCX file" is shown.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Resume Upload Progress Bar & ATS Analysis Score Generation
details.steps:
1. Select valid "sample_resume.pdf"
2. Tap "Analyze Resume"
3. Monitor progress bar -> wait for analysis result
details.expected: Upload progress bar reaches 100%, ATS Score card displays breakdown (e.g. 85/100) with key skill tags.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Missing Keywords & Actionable Improvement Bullet Points
details.steps:
1. Scroll down to Recommendations section
2. Verify missing keywords and formatting suggestions
details.expected: Actionable suggestions (e.g. "Add Kotlin Coroutines keyword", "Quantify metrics") are listed cleanly.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Job Keyword Search Field Input
details.steps:
1. Navigate to Jobs tab
2. Type "Android Developer" into search input bar
3. Tap Search icon
details.expected: Job list filters to show matching listings with title "Android Developer".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Filter Chips (Remote, Full-Time, Experience Level)
details.steps:
1. Tap "Remote" filter chip
2. Verify chip toggle state changes to active state
details.expected: List refilters dynamically to display only remote job opportunities.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Job Card Tap & Full Job Description Modal Loading
details.steps:
1. Tap first job item in list
2. Verify Job Details screen opens with Company, Salary, Requirements
details.expected: Full job details screen opens showing salary range, location, requirements, and Apply button.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify 1-Click Resume Application Submission
details.steps:
1. Tap "Apply Now"
2. Select attached resume
3. Tap Submit Application
details.expected: Success notification dialog displays "Application Submitted Successfully!" with checkmark icon.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Past Sessions List Rendering with Timestamps and Scores
details.steps:
1. Open Sessions tab
2. Inspect past session item entries in LazyColumn
details.expected: Past interview session items display date, time, interview type, and score percentage badge.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Session Detail Tap & Audio Playback Widget
details.steps:
1. Tap a past session item
2. Verify Audio Player bar with Play/Pause button and seeker bar
details.expected: Recorded audio response plays back cleanly with responsive audio controls.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Candidate Competency Radar Chart Rendering
details.steps:
1. Navigate to Analytics tab inside Session Detail
2. Check MPAndroidChart / Compose Canvas Radar chart
details.expected: Radar chart renders scores across Technical Knowledge, Communication, Confidence, and Problem Solving.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify PDF / Excel Analysis Export Download Handler
details.steps:
1. Tap "Export Full Analysis Report"
2. Choose PDF or Excel format
details.expected: Report file saved to Android Download folder, confirmation notification shown.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Edit Name, Headline, and Tech Skills Form Update
details.steps:
1. Open Profile tab
2. Tap "Edit Profile"
3. Update Name to "John Senior Dev"
4. Tap Save
details.expected: Profile updates instantly, success toast appears, stored in database.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Dark Theme Toggle Switch Execution
details.steps:
1. Tap Settings -> Dark Theme switch toggle
2. Observe app theme mode shift
details.expected: App changes theme dynamically between Light (#FFFFFF) and Dark Void (#09090B) themes.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Password Change Flow Validation
details.steps:
1. Tap Security -> Change Password
2. Enter Old Password & New Password
3. Tap Update Password
details.expected: Password update confirmed by backend API, session key invalidated requiring re-authentication.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Logout Dialog & Encrypted SharedPreferences Clear
details.steps:
1. Scroll down to bottom of Settings
2. Tap "Logout"
3. Confirm Logout in alert dialog
details.expected: Tokens cleared from storage, WebSocket disconnected, user redirected to Login screen.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.
